PLAINTIFF JAMES HINE'S Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records Of Oppenheimer Investigations Group, Llp

Plaintiff James Hine's Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records Of Oppenheimer Investigations Group, LLP is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. (see word minutes for complete ruling)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.
